summary:
I have successfully found the "needle" (the `BUFFER_SIZE` truncation bug in `src/main.rs`) and verified the fix.

The `test.sh` script now passes:
```
Input file size: 102400 bytes
Processed /tmp/input.dat -> /tmp/output.dat (102400 bytes)
Output file size: 102400 bytes
PASS: File processed correctly, no data loss
```
